name: Fluffal Penguin
name_jp: ファーニマル・ペンギン
desc: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon 1 "Fluffal" monster from your hand, except "Fluffal Penguin". This effect can only be used once while this card is face-up on the field. If this card is sent to the Graveyard as a Fusion Material for a Fusion Summon of a "Frightfur" Fusion Monster: You can draw 2 cards, then discard 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Fluffal Penguin" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon 1 "Fluffal" monster from your hand, except "Fluffal Penguin". This effect can only be used once while this card is face-up on the field. If this card is sent to the Graveyard as a Fusion Material for a Fusion Summon of a "Frightfur" Fusion Monster: You can draw 2 cards, then discard 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Fluffal Penguin" once per turn.
eff: During your Main Phase: You can Special Summon 1 "Fluffal" monster from your hand, except "Fluffal Penguin". This effect can only be used once while this card is face-up on the field. If this card is sent to the Graveyard as a Fusion Material for a Fusion Summon of a "Frightfur" Fusion Monster: You can draw 2 cards, then discard 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Fluffal Penguin" once per turn.

action: Activates if used as Fusion Material
misc: Once while face-up on the field
